operation.add: {% if returned_products is defined and product.order_product_id in returned_products %} {% else %} {% endif %}
{% if is_alliance_refunded %} {{ text_order_fully_refunded }} {% else %} {% endif %}

<script type="text/javascript">
            function proceedPartialReturn() {
                var selected = [];
                var refund_shipping = $('#refund-shipping').is(':checked') ? 1 : 0;
                $('.return-checkbox:checked').each(function() {
                    selected.push($(this).val());
                });

                if (selected.length == 0) {
                    alert('{{ text_please_select_products }}');
                    return;
                }

                if (confirm('{{ text_confirm_return_requests }}')) {
                    $.ajax({
                        url: 'index.php?route=extension/payment/refund/refund&user_token={{ user_token }}&order_id={{ order_id }}',
                        type: 'post',
                        data: { product_ids: selected, is_full_refund: false, refund_shipping: refund_shipping },
                        dataType: 'json',
                        success: function(json) {
                            if (json['success']) { alert(json['message']); location.reload(); }
                            if (json['error']) { alert(json['message']); }
                        }
                    });
                }
            }
            </script>
